name: ASRock Rack TURIND8HM3 Half-Width Server Motherboard - Single Socket SP5 - 8x DIMM slots (Supports DDR5 RDIMM, RDIMM-3DS) - 2x PCIe5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe5.0 x8 - 1x OCuLink (2 SATA 6G/b) by ASM1061R - Remote Management (IPMI) - 2x M.2 Ports (TURIND8HM3)
shortName: ASRock Rack TURIND8HM3 Half-Width Server Motherboard - Single Socket
description: Server-grade half-width motherboard with EPYC SP5 socket, PCIe 5.0, and IPMI management.
